summary: Frontend testing completed for CAIWAVE - all 6 requested features verified working correctly. Homepage loads without dark screen issue, Captive Portal shows ads and WiFi packages, Login works for advertiser credentials, Advertiser Dashboard shows stats, and My Ads page displays ad cards with video preview overlay.
passed_tests: ✅ Homepage loads correctly (no dark screen) - Shows CAIWAVE branding, navigation, hero section with 'Transform Your WiFi Into Revenue'
✅ Captive Portal at /portal/demo shows ads from the system - 'Nairobi Business Expo 2026' ad displayed with image and 'Visit Website' button
✅ Captive Portal shows WiFi packages for purchase - 7 packages displayed (KES 5 to KES 200) with duration and speed info
✅ Login works for advertiser@caiwave.com / advertiser123 - Successfully redirects to /advertiser dashboard
✅ Advertiser Dashboard at /advertiser shows stats - Total Ads (1), Active (0), Pending (1), Impressions (0)
✅ Advertiser Dashboard shows Advertising Packages - Small Area (KES 300), Large Area (KES 1,000), Wide Area (KES 3,500)
✅ Advertiser My Ads page at /advertiser/ads shows ad cards with video preview overlay
✅ Video ad card displays: play button overlay, status badge (Pending Approval), price badge (KES 300), duration (10s), title, package type, Website button, views/clicks stats, Cancel button
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are working correctly
Video preview overlay is properly implemented with play button icon
Captive Portal API endpoint /api/ads/active is working correctly
Authentication flow works smoothly for advertiser role
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 requested features are working correctly: Homepage (no dark screen), Captive Portal (ads + packages), Login (advertiser credentials), Advertiser Dashboard (stats), My Ads page (ad cards with video preview overlay). The video preview overlay shows a play button icon in the center of the video preview area.

homepage.details: No dark screen, shows CAIWAVE branding, navigation, hero section

captive_portal.ads_displayed: Nairobi Business Expo 2026 with image and Visit Website button

ad_card_elements.video_preview_overlay: Play button icon visible in center
ad_card_elements.title: Test Video Ad Campaign
